title: Thai Crunchy Potato Fritters
description: Crispy and delicious Thai-style fritters made with potatoes and a hint of spice.
instructions: Grate the potatoes and squeeze out excess moisture.
In a large bowl, combine the grated potatoes, flour, cornstarch, ginger, curry paste, egg, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the potato mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters until they are golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Drain the fritters on paper towels.
Serve the fritters hot with chopped scallions on top.
Enjoy your delicious Thai crunchy potato fritters!
Note: You can also bake the fritters in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for about 15-20 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
